checks.name: Unpaid checkout session rejection
checks.expected: Unpaid checkout sessions must not fulfil listings or create orders.
checks.actual: ok=false; error=Checkout session is not paid yet (status: unpaid).; fulfillCalls=0

checks.name: Missing listing metadata rejection
checks.expected: Paid checkout sessions without listing metadata must not fulfil listings.
checks.actual: ok=false; error=Checkout session is missing listing metadata.; fulfillCalls=0; paymentIntentId=pi_missing_meta

checks.name: Invalid webhook signature rejection
checks.expected: Malformed or unsigned webhook traffic must be rejected before fulfilment logic runs.

checks.name: Duplicate fulfilment prevention
checks.expected: The same payment-plus-listing pair must map to the same order id and short-circuit duplicate fulfilment.
